title: Respawn Save Points
description: Beds and Respawn Anchors now act as "save points" that restore the players inventory from the last time the player right clicked on them.
body:
**Description**

Respawn Save Points is a mod that allows beds (and respawn anchors) to now act as "save points" that restore your inventory and levels to a previous state. New items and xp gained during your adventures will be dropped still if not saved and lost durability will transfer to your saved inventory. If you lose an item and don't put it in the same slot, it's not restored. These same rules should also apply to any item that has an inventory if they have the right setup (quark backpacks, supplementeries' quivers, etc)
 

There are several config options that allow you to choose the % of items saved, what items to blacklist (bundles are backlisted on default), and if durability is transferred

Please note that this mod is in BETA until I'm in a happy enough state to put it as release. As such please report bugs and unintended dupe glitches to the github when possible.
 
**La descripción**

Respawn Save Points es un mod que hace que las camas (y nexos de reaparición) actúen como un "punto de guardado" que revierte su inventario y niveles de experiencia a un estado anterior. Todos los nuevos objetos y niveles de experiencia que hayas obtenido en tu aventura se perderán si no los guarda y la durabilidad perdida de sus objetos se transferirán en su inventario guardado. Si pierde un objeto y no lo pone en el mismo lugar, no se restaura. Estas mismas reglas aplican a cajas de shulker, las mochilas de Quark, las de Sophisticated Backpacks y las de Backpacked.

 

Estos muchos opciones en el config, que se puede elegir el % de objetos guardan, objetos no permiten, y si durabilidad se transfiere al morir
